q: Problem: High ROAS but low net profit. Hypothesis: High-margin products aren't selling. Solution?
opts: Use Value-Based Bidding with profit margins

q: Problem: Data-driven attribution (DDA) unavailable. Hypothesis: Conversion volume too low. Solution?
opts: Use Enhanced Conversions or aggregate data

q: Problem: High Internal Competition. Hypothesis: Keywords overlap across campaigns. Solution?
opts: Restructure with strict Negative Keyword mapping

q: Problem: Script fails due to Selector limits. Hypothesis: Processing too many entities. Solution?
opts: Use Iterators and filter by conditions

q: Problem: High CPC on brand keywords. Hypothesis: Competitor using your brand in ad copy. Solution?
opts: File a Trademark Complaint with Google

q: Problem: PMax is cannibalizing high-intent Search traffic. Hypothesis: Search themes too broad. Solution?
opts: Add exact match keywords to Search & negatives to PMax

q: Problem: Conversion value is Zero for many sales. Hypothesis: JavaScript error on Thank You page. Solution?
opts: Audit the DataLayer and GTM tags

q: Problem: High Invalid Click rate from one IP. Hypothesis: Competitor bot attack. Solution?
opts: Exclude specific IP addresses in settings

q: Problem: RLSA lists are not populating. Hypothesis: Audience size below 1,000 users. Solution?
Problem: High CPA for New Customers only. Hypothesis: Bidding doesn't distinguish new vs returning. Solution?
Problem: Smart Bidding is Over-optimizing. Hypothesis: Target CPA set too low. Solution?
opts: Gradually increase tCPA to allow more volume

q: Problem: Ad Customizers showing errors. Hypothesis: Feed/spreadsheet link is broken. Solution?
Problem: High Lost IS Budget at 11 AM. Hypothesis: Daily budget exhausted too early. Solution?
opts: Increase budget or use Standard delivery

q: Problem: CRM data doesn't match Google Ads conversions. Hypothesis: Attribution window mismatch. Solution?
opts: Align the Lookback Window in Google Ads

q: Problem: Click-to-Lead ratio is 1:100 (B2B). Hypothesis: Lead Magnet is not valuable enough. Solution?
opts: A/B test a more compelling Offer/Whitepaper

q: Problem: RSA has Low Ad Strength. Hypothesis: All headlines contain the same keyword. Solution?
opts: Use distinct USPs and benefits in headlines

q: Problem: DSA targeting Login pages. Hypothesis: No URL Contains exclusions. Solution?
opts: Add Login as a Negative Dynamic Ad Target

q: Problem: High bounce rate on landing page experiment. Hypothesis: Mobile form is too long. Solution?
opts: Shorten the form or use Lead Form Extensions

q: Problem: Auction Insights show Overlap Rate over 50%. Hypothesis: Two campaigns bidding on same query. Solution?
Problem: Seasonality adjustments made no impact. Hypothesis: Adjustment applied after the spike ended. Solution?
Problem: Conversion Rate is 0% on weekends. Hypothesis: Call Center is closed. Solution?
opts: Use Ad Scheduling to pause during off-hours

q: Problem: Value-Based Bidding is erratic. Hypothesis: Extreme Outlier values are skewing AI. Solution?
opts: Set a Conversion Value Cap or remove outliers

q: Problem: Low Top of Page share for key terms. Hypothesis: Competitors have higher QS and Bid. Solution?
opts: Audit Landing Page for Relevance and Speed

q: Problem: Enhanced Conversions status is Not Working. Hypothesis: PII data not hashed correctly. Solution?
opts: Check GTM configuration for SHA-256 hashing

q: Problem: Scaling budget leads to 2x higher CPA. Hypothesis: Reaching Diminishing Returns in niche. Solution?
opts: Expand to Lookalike/Similar or New Channels
